posts.author: Gilad (Gilad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday champs!

We’re building a new app that brings no-code AI directly into monday.com boards. With the App, you can easily predict things like:

  • Which leads are most likely to convert
  • Which customers might churn
  • How likely a deal is to close
  • Suggested deal size
  • And much more — all based on your existing board data.

We’re currently opening up early access for beta testers. If you’re curious about AI or want to make smarter decisions using your monday.com data, drop a comment or DM me and I’ll get you access!

Thanks,
Gilad
